/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/multimodal_cli.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/multimodal_cli.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/multimodal_cli.dir/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/multimodal_cli.dir/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/multimodal_cli.dir/llm_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/multimodal_cli.dir/tui_interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/multimodal_cli.dir/server_mode.cpp.o -o multimodal_cli   -L/home/kenonix/gits/cpp/LiteRT-LM/prebuilt/linux_x86_64  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kenonix/gits/cpp/LiteRT-LM/prebuilt/linux_x86_64 -lLiteRt -lpthread -ldl
